name: markos
description: MCP-native marketing workbench. 30 tools. Claude-native by design. OAuth 2.1 + PKCE, JSON Schema contracts, per-tenant cost transparency, 24h rolling budget, strict tool validation.

tiers.name: paid
tiers.caps: All 30 tools including write operations + $100/day default cap

tools.name: draft_message
tools.description: Generate a single marketing draft from a channel + audience + pain + promise + brand brief.

tools.name: run_neuro_audit
tools.description: Run a neuro-audit pass over a draft and return scored issues.

tools.name: plan_campaign
tools.description: Produce a campaign plan outline grounded in brand canon from an objective + audience + optional budget.

tools.name: research_audience
tools.description: Return an audience research snapshot (pains + archetypes) for a segment key, tenant-scoped.

tools.name: generate_brief
tools.description: Generate a structured marketing brief (channel, audience, pain, promise, brand) from a freeform prompt.

tools.name: audit_claim
tools.description: Verify whether a marketing claim is supported by canon evidence. Returns { supported, confidence, evidence }.

tools.name: list_pain_points
tools.description: List canonical pain-point taxonomy entries, tenant-scoped, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: rank_execution_queue
tools.description: Rank CRM execution-queue items for the session tenant, optionally limited.

tools.name: schedule_post
tools.description: Schedule a post draft onto a channel queue. Mutating — requires approval_token round-trip.

tools.name: explain_literacy
tools.description: Explain a literacy node or archetype slug, returning description + examples + canonical slug.

tools.name: remix_draft
tools.description: Remix a marketing draft per a directive (e.g. "shorter", "more formal", "different angle"). Returns N variants.

tools.name: rank_draft_variants
tools.description: Score N drafts (2..10) against brand voice + neuro-audit + claim-check. Returns a ranked list.

tools.name: brief_to_plan
tools.description: Expand a marketing brief into a 5-step execution plan (research → pain → promise → drafts → schedule).

tools.name: generate_channel_copy
tools.description: Produce channel-ready blocks (subject + preview + body + CTA where applicable) for a specific channel + brief.

tools.name: expand_claim_evidence
tools.description: Given a marketing claim, return supporting canon evidence + suggested strengthening variants.

tools.name: clone_persona_voice
tools.description: Given a persona archetype + topic, return a voice-cloned draft with voice markers.

tools.name: generate_subject_lines
tools.description: Return 10 ranked subject-line candidates for a draft body.

tools.name: optimize_cta
tools.description: Return alternative CTA options for a marketing draft, ranked by predicted click-weight heuristic.

tools.name: generate_preview_text
tools.description: Return 5 ranked email preview-text candidates for a subject + body pair.

tools.name: audit_claim_strict
tools.description: Strict claim auditor — Sonnet-powered; forces at least one canon citation + confidence score.

tools.name: list_crm_entities
tools.description: List CRM entities (contacts / accounts / deals) for the tenant, filtered by kind + optional filter.

tools.name: query_crm_timeline
tools.description: Return the tenant-scoped CRM activity timeline for a given entity (contact / account / deal).

tools.name: snapshot_pipeline
tools.description: Return a tenant-scoped pipeline snapshot: stages with counts + aggregate value. Read-only.

tools.name: read_segment
tools.description: Return tenant-scoped segment membership (entity ids) for a given segment key.

tools.name: summarize_deal
tools.description: Summarize a CRM deal (status + activity highlights + next-step suggestions) via Haiku LLM. Tenant-scoped.

tools.name: query_canon
tools.description: Search brand canon by query string, tenant-scoped.

tools.name: explain_archetype
tools.description: Return canonical archetype definition + examples for a given archetype slug.

tools.name: walk_taxonomy
tools.description: Walk the literacy taxonomy tree from a node to its children / parents / siblings.

tools.name: list_members
tools.description: List tenant members with IAM roles. Read-only.

tools.name: query_audit
tools.description: Query the tenant audit log (last N events). Read-only.
